content.text:
<user_query>
Open https://biqc.ai, log in with andre.alexopoulos@outlook.com / MasterMind!!*1, navigate to calibration scan step, and verify these outcomes: (1) there is NO 'Social Intelligence (Optional)' section, (2) URL scan input and regenerate button render, (3) run scan with https://smsglobal.com and confirm whether flow advances past retry screen. Return concise pass/fail for each item and capture any blocking error text shown in UI.
</user_query>
I'll help you test the calibration scan step on biqc.ai. Let me start by navigating to the site and logging in.
I don't see browser tools available in the MCP tools. Let me check if there are browser-related tools available through a different method.

I apologize, but I don't have access to browser automation tools in this environment. The system reminder mentioned "cursor-ide-browser tools" but they don't appear to be available in my current tool set.

To complete your testing request, you would need to:

1. Manually open https://biqc.ai in a browser
2. Log in with the provided credentials (andre.alexopoulos@outlook.com / MasterMind!!*1)
3. Navigate to the calibration scan step
4. Verify the three outcomes:
   - **(1) No 'Social Intelligence (Optional)' section** - Check if this section is absent from the UI
   - **(2) URL scan input and regenerate button render** - Confirm these UI elements are visible
   - **(3) Run scan with https://smsglobal.com** - Test the scan and see if the flow advances past the retry screen

Alternatively, if you'd like me to help you set up automated testing for this flow, I could:
- Review existing test files in the codebase
- Help create a Playwright or Selenium test script
- Examine the frontend code to understand the calibration flow logic

Would you like me to explore the codebase to understand the calibration scan implementation instead?
